title: 2 Pieces Blackboard Eraser, Blackboard Eraser with Wooden Handle, Thick Felt Cleaning, Large Whiteboard Cleaning Tool
features: [Product Content]: You will receive 2 pieces of blackboard erasers, measuring 3.5*4.5*15cm, suitable for school teaching and providing efficient cleaning effects.

[Product Material]: The eraser is made of wood and felt. The wooden handle is sturdy and durable and feels comfortable to hold. Thick felt is soft and durable, making it easy to erase chalk marks from blackboards and whiteboards, keeping them clean.

[Efficient Cleaning]: This product is designed for efficient cleaning. The thick felt can effectively absorb chalk dust and remove chalk marks on the board, keeping your blackboard or whiteboard clear and tidy at all times.

[Quiet and dust-free]: This blackboard eraser is designed to be quiet and dust-free. It will not produce noise or raise dust when used, providing a quiet and healthy teaching environment and protecting the health of teachers and students.

[Wide Applicability]: This blackboard eraser is suitable for various teaching scenarios, including school classrooms, training institutions and conference rooms. Whether it is a blackboard or a whiteboard, it can be cleaned efficiently, making it an ideal choice for teaching and office use.
description: Product Details eraser Material: wood, felt Colour: Black Size: 3.5*4.5*15cm Quantity: 2 pieces
